title: transfer — notification classes + categories
description: Three notifications covering the terminal outcome space. Channels resolved once at dispatch from xfer_jobs.notify_channels and delivered through the notifications module. Cancellations are silent — the user initiated them.

categories.description: Sent when an import / export / sample job succeeds. Copy includes counters + download call-to-action (for exports).
Sent when an import completed but some rows failed validation. Copy includes counters + 'Download errors report' call-to-action linking the errors.csv artifact.
Sent when a job could not complete. Copy includes error code + short human message + 'View details' call-to-action.
